title: glebionis carinata
intro: Glebionis carinata, also known as the Korean daisy or oxeye daisy, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Glebionis carinata lie in its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to aid in the management of certain types of cancer and diabetes. Glebionis carinata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
